backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing storage, authorization, user profiles, and admin-controlled CRUD for products (with validation and sorting helpers), plus additional production-management logic not fully shown.
feature_evidence.json: Machine-readable report listing implemented features, affected frontend files, dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for recent fixes and enhancements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten overview mapping key frontend source files to short descriptions of their responsibilities across app, pages, components, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark themes via CSS variables, base styles, and consistent color system for the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring meta tags, PWA support, icons, service worker registration, and mounting the React app.
frontend/public/assetlinks.json: Android Digital Asset Links configuration enabling URL handling for the TWA, requiring the app’s SHA-256 certificate fingerprint.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, display mode, theme colors, shortcuts, and scope for installable behavior.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing precaching, cache versioning, and runtime caching strategies for offline support and fast reloads.
frontend/public/TWA_SETUP.md: Documentation guiding how to package the web app as an Android APK using Trusted Web Activity, including prerequisites and build steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that provides theming, layout, header/footer, and tab-based navigation between lazily loaded Data Entry and Admin pages with suspense loading states.
frontend/src/components/admin/MachinesMa: Admin UI for listing, sorting, adding, editing, and deleting machines with authentication checks and dialog-based forms.
frontend/src/components/admin/OperatorsM: Admin UI for managing operators, including sorted tables, create/edit dialogs, delete actions, and authentication gating.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin UI for managing products with multiple numeric fields, client-side sorting, and CRUD dialogs backed by query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsVie: Comprehensive reporting interface that fetches production entries by various filters, displays tables, supports deletion, and exports reports to files.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright information and a branded link with an icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying the app title, login button, and a light/dark theme toggle using next-themes.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: Reusable loading indicator panel with a spinner icon and optional message.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login/logout, shows loading state, and clears cached queries on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Empty placeholder file intended for a future profile setup dialog component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Defines a React hook that creates and caches a backend actor via React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated identities. It recreates the actor when identity changes and invalidates dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/logout, and status via a React context and provider. Handles loading stored identities and configuring login options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data such as products, machines, operators, and production entries. Integrates authentication checks, cache invalidation, sorting, and user-facing error toasts.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS layers and defines extensive CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors and layout tokens. Adds base styles and component tweaks like scrollable dropdowns.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app, wiring up React Query and Internet Identity providers. Imports global styles and mounts the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Renders an admin dashboard with tabbed navigation for managing products, machines, operators, and reports. Uses shared UI components and icons for a structured layout.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Implements a production data entry form that loads machines, operators, and products and calculates targets, cycle times, and operator hours in real time. Submits new production entries via backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes raw backend error messages into user-friendly text by matching common authorization and validation patterns. Falls back to the original error message when no match is found.
frontend/src/utils/operatorHours.ts: Contains utilities to calculate total operator hours based on duty time thresholds, cycle times, quantity, and downtime. Also provides formatting helpers for human-readable time intervals.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormat.ts: Provides a shared utility to format fractional seconds into a rounded "Xm Ys" string with proper carry and zero-padded seconds for consistent display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Contains helpers to read URL parameters from query or hash routing, persist them in sessionStorage, retrieve/clear them, and safely remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining content paths, dark mode, container settings, extended color system via CSS variables, custom radii, shadows, animations, and registered plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata and state snapshot describing the Production Management App, its architecture, and a detailed list of existing frontend and backend features with versions.
